milestones.name: Bootstrap Core Package
deliverables: Add backend registry and policy interfaces
Implement CPU backend stubs and host realization layer
exit_criteria: Package loads on macOS with no accelerated backend installed
Core objects validate as Matrix-compatible subclasses
All public methods route through a single backend dispatch layer

milestones.name: CPU Semantic Baseline
deliverables: Implement %*%, crossprod, tcrossprod, solve, chol, qr, svd, eigen, t, rowSums, colSums, diag
exit_criteria: CPU-only outputs match Matrix/base semantics for covered operations
Fallback paths are deterministic and tested
Serialization does not persist stale backend state

milestones.name: Conformance Harness
deliverables: Fixture coverage for metadata, dimnames, and edge values
exit_criteria: Every covered method has a CPU-reference conformance test
The suite can run in CPU-only CI
Backend implementations can be plugged into the same parity harness

milestones.name: Apple Dense Backend
deliverables: Implement dense MLX kernels for the initial method surface
Benchmark representative dense workloads on Apple Silicon
exit_criteria: MLX-backed methods pass backend parity tests
Unsupported paths realize host state and complete correctly
At least one benchmark class shows meaningful speedup versus CPU baseline

milestones.name: Portable Dense Backend
deliverables: Implement dense ArrayFire kernels for the same backend contract
exit_criteria: ArrayFire backend passes the same parity suite as CPU and MLX for covered dense operations
No public API changes are required in amatrix
ArrayFire remains an optional install-time dependency

milestones.name: Selective Sparse Acceleration
deliverables: Implement sparse matvec and sparse-dense matmul where support is credible
Add tested internal format conversion pathways
exit_criteria: CSC remains the canonical public sparse format
Sparse acceleration is limited to explicitly supported operations
Fallback remains correct for all unsupported sparse cases

milestones.name: ALTREP Dense Path
deliverables: Integrate deferred host realization for supported backend chains
Add serialization and fallback tests specific to ALTREP
exit_criteria: User-visible APIs remain unchanged
Dense host materialization is deferred where expected
Serialization and fallback remain deterministic
